ddls:
CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "business_unit_id" INTEGER /* Business unit ID the role belongs to */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Owner ID or administrator of the role */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type ID of role (e.g., IT, business) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the role (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES role_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_business_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_unit_id") REFERENCES business_units ("business_unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the operation was performed on */,
  "operation_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation type (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "operation_date" TEXT /* Date when the operation was performed */,
  "performed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the operation */,
  "operation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_operations_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_operations_performed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_operations_operation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_type_id") REFERENCES operations ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_units" (
  "business_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the business unit */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department under which the business unit operates */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the business unit */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the business unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the owner belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the role type (e.g., IT, business) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managed_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the attribute is associated with */,
  "application" TEXT /* Application the attribute is relevant for */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_managed_attributes_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation type */,
  "operation_name" TEXT /* Name of the operation (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation performed */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role involved in the operation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the operation */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the operation */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES operations ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission is associated with */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_lifecycle" (
  "lifecycle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifecycle stage */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "lifecycle_stage" TEXT /* Current lifecycle stage of the role (e.g., active, inactive, pending_deletion) */,
  "lifecycle_date" TEXT /* Date when the role entered the current lifecycle stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifecycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_lifecycle_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user requesting access */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the access request was made */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the access request (e.g., approved, denied, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_requests_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
